judgements.reason: Reasoning (Google Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform + AWS Bedrock AgentCore + OpenAI Workspace Agents convergence precondition, SSO + CASB / SSPM agent-ID first-class consequence, Q3 2026 Okta / Entra / Workspace agent-ID category landing) holds. Apr 24-30 bridges show convergent agent-control-plane shape across all three cloud arenas plus Okta Showcase 2026 blueprint. Cisco $400M Astrix May 4 acquisition is a CASB/SSPM-adjacent NHI primitive that supports the agent-ID-as-first-class trajectory.

Seven bridges Apr 24 - Apr 30 at rel=2-5 across because/so_that/given consistently support the agent-control-plane convergence thesis. No contradicts; each entry extends rather than retracts the prior week's signal. Cisco Astrix May 4 (visible via 5acccd's bridge) is also relevant context for the NHI / agent-ID pillar.

Three Needs (hyperscaler agent-platform PMs at Google/AWS/OpenAI on unified control plane; SSO/IdP PMs at Okta/Entra/Workspace on first-class agent principal; CASB/SSPM PMs at Netskope/Palo Alto/Defender for Cloud Apps/Wing on AI-agent SLO/risk-score) all status=open. No unified agent control plane GA'd; no agent-ID first-class principal type ratified at SSO providers; no separate AI-agent SLO/risk-score metric live.

Seven chain edges and six relations cohere. Entails relation with c08481a6 (Agent Registry standard) is the correct structural prerequisite; parallels with b83721f7 (statutory agent-identity), 5094f95c (MCP Gateway), c850d46b (OAuth-scope SSO carve-out) are all logically adjacent. No upstream contradicted.
